title: pinus devoniana subsp. procera
intro: Pinus devoniana subsp. procera, also known as the Corsican Pine, is a subspecies of the evergreen tree Pinus devoniana. The Corsican Pine is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in essential oils, terpenes, and flavonoids, which provide health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the Corsican Pine is often used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections.
